title: Polymer membrane with acacia gum (gum arabic) additive
abstract: The polymer membrane with acacia gum (gum Arabic) additive is a membrane made by casting a polymer with acacia gum additive to improve porosity, reduce hydrophobia, and provide antifouling for the membrane. The polymer may be polysulfone, polyethersulfone, or any other polymer known in the art for making separation membranes. The membrane may be prepared by the phase inversion method, or by casting followed by evaporation of the solvent. The membrane may be used for water desalination, water purification, nano-micro-, or ultrafiltration, gas purification, and other processes. The acacia gum (gum arabic) additive increases the pore size, porosity, flux, and hydrophilicity of the membrane while reducing surface roughness and membrane fouling.
claims: Claims CLAIMS We claim: 1. A polymer membrane with acacia gum additive, comprising a membrane made of a polymer and an additive, the additive being acacia gum. 2. The polymer membrane according to claim 1, wherein the polymer comprises polysulfone. 3. The polymer membrane according to claim 1, wherein the polymer comprises poly ethersulf one . 4. The polymer membrane according to claim 3, wherein the membrane is an asymmetric membrane, having a thin surface layer supported on a porous substrate. 5. The polymer membrane according to claim 3, wherein the membrane has an average pore radius between 7.2 and 9.3 nm. 6. A method of making a polymer membrane with acacia gum additive, comprising the steps of: dissolving polysulfone and gum Arabic in an organic solvent to form a casting solution; sonicating the casting solution; and casting the sonicated casting solution onto a support. 7. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, wherein the organic solvent comprises N,N-dimethylacetamide. 8. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, wherein the casting solution comprises 80% Î,Î-dimethylacetamide by weight and between 1.0% and 7.0% acacia gum by weight, the balance being polysulfone. 9. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, further comprising the step of evaporating the organic solvent after said casting step in order to form the membrane. 10. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, further comprising the step of immersing the cast solution in water to form the membrane by phase inversion. 11. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, further comprising the step of mixing the casting solution for a period of two hours at a temperature of 60Â°C prior to said casting step. 12. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 6, further comprising the step of degassing the casting solution for six hours prior to said casting step. 13. A method of making a polymer membrane with acacia gum additive, comprising the steps of: dissolving polyethersulfone and gum Arabic in an organic solvent to form a dope solution; and casting the dope solution onto a support. 14. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 13, wherein said organic solvent comprises N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone. 15. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 13, wherein said dope solution comprises between 0.1% and 3.0% acacia gum by weight. 16. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 13, further comprising the step of immersing the cast dope solution in water to form the membrane by phase inversion. 17. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 16, further comprising the step of peeling the membrane from the support. 18. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 13, further comprising the step of mixing the dope solution for a period of two hours at a temperature of 60Â°C prior to said casting step. 19. The method of making a polymer membrane according to claim 13, further comprising the step of degassing the casting solution for six hours prior to said casting step.
